servinfo.title: Rear Side-Impact Sensor Removal and Installation

attention1.ptxt: Failure to take proper precautions when handling the air bag system sensors can result in personal injury due to non-deployed air bag system in the event of an accident or accidental air bag deployment.

item.ptxt: Never impact or shake the sensors.
Otherwise, proper operation of the sensors cannot be assured.
Always tighten the mounting bolts to the specified torque when installing the sensors. Otherwise, proper operation of the sensors cannot be assured.

s1.ptxt: Disconnect rear side-impact sensor connector (2) as follows.

s2.ptxt: Release locking slider (1) by sliding it in direction of arrow “1”.
Disconnect rear side-impact sensor connector (2) by pulling it in direction of arrow “2”.

s1.ptxt: Remove rear side-impact sensor bolt (3) and remove rear side-impact sensor (4) from rear pillar inner panel (5).
Check that none of the following faulty conditions exists.

item.ptxt: Bend, deformation or rust on quarter inner panel.

s1.ptxt: Align mounting pin (1) to mounting hole (2) of vehicle to install rear side-impact sensor (3) securely.
Tighten rear side-impact sensor bolt to specified torque.
Connect rear side-impact sensor connector securely.
